name: cc-plugin-codex
description: Delegate typed read, review, and isolated-write tasks from Codex to Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate work and reviews to Claude Code
interface.longDescription: Run typed read-only tasks, code and plan reviews, sandboxed isolated writes with explicit apply/discard, summary transfers, and detached Claude Code jobs from Codex.
defaultPrompt: Ask Claude Code to review my current changes.
Ask Claude Code to review this saved implementation plan.
Delegate this implementation task to Claude Code.
Show my Claude Code background jobs.
